caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front and a black baseball cap sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain, and he is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features a repeating logo that says "HUSTLE" accompanied by stars. To his right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101." Two identical graphic overlays are present on the screen: one on the left side containing a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right side that reads "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his right with a neutral expression, while his posture and facial position shift subtly as he breathes and speaks.
